meta.metric: modelled dementia prevalence among residents aged 60+ (%)
meta.source: GBD 2023 age-specific rates × WorldPop 2020 1km age/sex population
meta.note: MODELLED estimate; GBD 2023 (IHME, non-commercial) × WorldPop 2020 1km age/sex population; sub-national age structure not resolved by this population product — single national estimate shown
